flux.description: Let the Flux manager scan every YAML file (HelmRelease chart versions, GitRepository/OCIRepository refs) anywhere in the tree, not just a default path.

helm-values.description: Let the helm-values manager scan every YAML file for image tags pinned inside HelmRelease .spec.values, which the flux manager alone would miss.

customManagers.description: Headlamp plugins fetched at runtime by the chart pluginsManager (configContent). Tracked against the headlamp-k8s/plugins repo, where each plugin is tagged '<name>-<version>' (e.g. flux-0.6.0).
tsidp runs as a plain Deployment (not a HelmRelease), so the flux/helm-values managers don't see its image tag. Track it directly against the ghcr.io image.

CI tool versions pinned as env vars in the PR workflow and fetched via curl. The github-actions manager only tracks `uses:` tags, so these are matched off the `# renovate:` annotation comments above each var.

packageRules.description: Group Kyverno chart and Policy Reporter updates
Group Flux GitOps toolkit component bumps
Require manual approval for major version bumps
